ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey content and purpose */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses collected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., Active, Closed, Draft) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey ends */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the survey (e.g., Researchers, Educators, General Public) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey to which the question belongs */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., Multiple Choice, Open-Ended, Likert Scale) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the question is mandatory */,
  "dependency" INTEGER /* Reference to another question that this question depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question being answered */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response provided by the participant */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was submitted */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to answer the question */,
  "response_option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the selected response option (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the participant is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., researcher, educator) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the participant is based */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the participant is based */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Field of research the participant specializes in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within their institution */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the participant's information can be made public */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated question */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the response option */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the option in the selection list */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score associated with the response option (useful for quantitative analysis) */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the option is a custom option provided by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the participant */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in their field */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree attained by the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Political affiliation of the participant */,
  "religious_belief" TEXT /* Religious belief of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey being analyzed */,
  "summary_statistics" TEXT /* Summary statistics derived from the survey data */,
  "visualization_files" TEXT /* File paths to visualizations generated from the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted (e.g., Descriptive, Inferential) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis methodology */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who provided feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Text of the feedback comments */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey link */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated survey */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL link for participants to access the survey */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey link expires */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the link */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the link is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_links_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey from which data is exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "exported_by_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user who exported the data */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the exported data is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
